title: Variables not expanded in test string args
description: RFC 5229 §3: 'Variable substitution is performed on all string arguments... in test commands.' eval_header_test, eval_address_test, eval_envelope_test, and eval_exists_test pass raw Form::Str/StringList values to apply_match/collect_*_string_lists without calling expand_vars. A script like: set "k" "spam"; if header :contains "Subject" "${k}" { fileinto "Spam"; } — will look for literal '${k}' in Subject instead of 'spam'. Any script that uses variables in test arguments is broken. Only action arguments (fileinto, reject) currently call expand_vars.
